claim: All 15 +1/4 Trans-stratum families in T2B-PLUS-QUARTER-SURVEY/families.json satisfy a2 = b1^2/4 (discriminant identity Delta = 2 b1^2); sign of a2 is forced positive by the identity.

T2B-DELTA2-VERIFICATION dataset_verification.json reports n_total_trans_deg21=94, n_on_R2=78, ratio_distribution={'-2/9': 78, '1/4': 16}; the 78 R2-locus hits satisfy a2 = -2 b1^2 / 9 by construction of R2.

Today's b1=6 sweep T2B-RESONANCE-B67-B6-DISPATCH used A2_VALUES = list(range(1, 31)), structurally excluding the predicted -2/9 leg at b1=6 (a2 = -8). The 1-Trans/0-minus-2/9 outcome is therefore consistent with the bimodal-stratum characterization rather than a falsification of it.
